description_long: This is a rectangular cake with a flat top surface decorated with a cartoon character, likely Stewie Griffin from Family Guy, holding two large objects that resemble candles or toy weapons. The cake's top is bordered with a ring of red triangular icing peaks, and the background is a bright yellow with the character's image centrally placed. The sides of the cake are a light blue color, and the cake sits on a red rectangular base, possibly a cake board. Two large cylindrical objects, colored orange and white, are inserted vertically into the cake, adding a dramatic, themed effect. The cake also features black rectangular shapes and stylized text on the top, contributing to its playful, character-themed design.
description: A rectangular, character-themed cake with a cartoon image, red icing border, and two large cylindrical decorations on top, set on a red base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cartoon character's face and upper body, two large vertical cylinders, and the red icing border clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the side of the cake, the character's head in profile, and the two black rectangular shapes on the top surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the character, the two vertical cylinders, and the full extent of the red icing border.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the character's head in profile, the two cylinders, and the stylized text on the cake's top surface.
